calendar.matters:
NAME CHANGE CALENDAR
Off Calendar Jul-16-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 514. Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: K. Dougherty. Proceedings Not Reported.

Petitioner Craig Bernard Lymus, Jr., a/k/a Craig B. Lymus, Jr., a/k/a Craig Lymus, Jr., a/k/a Craig Lymus, was present in pro per.
Proof of Publication in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to James Craig Laveaux.

Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.
